query: ALTER TABLE conference_attendees ADD COLUMN qr_code VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, ADD COLUMN checked_in BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE, ADD COLUMN checked_in_at TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL, ADD COLUMN ticket_type VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT 'general', ADD COLUMN organization VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, ADD COLUMN accessibility_needs TEXT DEFAULT NULL; ALTER TABLE conferences ADD COLUMN translation_enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE, ADD COLUMN translation_languages TEXT DEFAULT NULL, ADD COLUMN transcript TEXT DEFAULT NULL, ADD COLUMN transcript_status VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT NULL; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS conference_speakers (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, conference_id INT NOT NULL, user_id INT DEFAULT NULL, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, bio TEXT DEFAULT NULL, photo_url VARCHAR(512) DEFAULT NULL, title VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, organization VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, social_twitter VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, social_linkedin VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, social_website VARCHAR(512) DEFAULT NULL, session_topic VARCHAR(512) DEFAULT NULL, speaker_order INT DEFAULT 0, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY (conference_id) REFERENCES conferences(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zpoeP3x1cmc7iMR.f2a79e44485f --database eSHiAmKDzW4pqcyH7Ttb7c --execute ALTER TABLE conference_attendees ADD COLUMN qr_code VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, ADD COLUMN checked_in BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE, ADD COLUMN checked_in_at TIMESTAMP NULL DEFAULT NULL, ADD COLUMN ticket_type VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT 'general', ADD COLUMN organization VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, ADD COLUMN accessibility_needs TEXT DEFAULT NULL; ALTER TABLE conferences ADD COLUMN translation_enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE, ADD COLUMN translation_languages TEXT DEFAULT NULL, ADD COLUMN transcript TEXT DEFAULT NULL, ADD COLUMN transcript_status VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT NULL; CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS conference_speakers (id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY, conference_id INT NOT NULL, user_id INT DEFAULT NULL, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, bio TEXT DEFAULT NULL, photo_url VARCHAR(512) DEFAULT NULL, title VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, organization VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, social_twitter VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, social_linkedin VARCHAR(255) DEFAULT NULL, social_website VARCHAR(512) DEFAULT NULL, session_topic VARCHAR(512) DEFAULT NULL, speaker_order INT DEFAULT 0, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, FOREIGN KEY (conference_id) REFERENCES conferences(id) ON DELETE CASCADE);
